mapper.insert: INSERT INTO production_result ( result_id, order_id, product_id, lot_no, actual_qty, defect_qty, worker_name, started_at, ended_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{resultId}, #{orderId}, #{productId}, #{lotNo}, #{actualQty}, #{defectQty}, #{workerName}, #{startedAt}, #{endedAt}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT result_id, order_id, product_id, lot_no, actual_qty, defect_qty, worker_name, started_at, ended_at, created_at FROM production_result ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT LPAD( IFNULL( MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(result_id, 14, 3) AS UNSIGNED)), 0 ) + 1, 3, '0' ) FROM production_result WHERE result_id LIKE CONCAT('PRS-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '%')
SELECT LPAD( IFNULL( MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(lot_no, -3) AS UNSIGNED)), -- 마지막 3자리 추출 0 ) + 1, 3, '0' ) FROM production_result WHERE lot_no LIKE CONCAT('LOT-', #{productCode}, '-', #{dateStr}, '%')

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM production_result pr LEFT JOIN work_order wo ON pr.order_id = wo.order_id LEFT JOIN product p ON pr.product_id = p.product_id
1=1
AND DATE(pr.created_at) >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE(pr.created_at) <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND wo.status = #{status}
AND ( pr.worker_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pr.order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pr.lot_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT pr.result_id, pr.order_id, pr.product_id, pr.lot_no, pr.actual_qty, pr.defect_qty, pr.worker_name, pr.started_at, pr.ended_at, pr.created_at,
wo.status, wo.order_qty, wo.order_manager as orderManager,
p.product_name as productName, pl.line_name as lineName
FROM production_result pr LEFT JOIN work_order wo ON pr.order_id = wo.order_id LEFT JOIN product p ON pr.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN production_line pl ON wo.line_id = pl.line_id WHERE pr.result_id = #{resultId}
SELECT order_id, order_qty, COALESCE(produced_qty, 0) AS producedQty, COALESCE(defect_qty, 0) AS defectQty, status FROM work_order WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
